requirements.name: Campaign coordination
requirements.description: Coordinates assigned campaign tasks with support.
requirements.business_rationale: Weekly campaign work needs a coordinator.
requirements.source_statement: This is entry level and the manager will support them.

requirements.name: Campaign coordination
requirements.description: Sets global campaign strategy without support.
requirements.business_rationale: A second manager expects independent global strategy.
requirements.source_statement: They must independently set global strategy from day one.

contradictions.description: Managers disagree on supported coordination versus independent global strategy.
source_statements: This is entry level and the manager will support them.
They must independently set global strategy from day one.
